heading: Have you already applied for help with your application fee?
question: Have you already applied for help with your application fee?

revealedHwfQuestion.label: Enter your Help with Fees reference number
revealedHwfQuestion.hint: You will have received this number when you applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application. For example, HWF-A1B-23C
